results.title: NASA-STD-8739.8
results.description: Document the results of this test in the Software Assurance Classification Report. 1 NASA defines safety-criticality from the definition of Hazard Severity in NPR 8715.3, NASA Safety Manual,
results.content:
Document the results of this test in the Software Assurance Classification Report. 1 NASA defines safety-criticality from the definition of Hazard Severity in NPR 8715.3, NASA Safety Manual,
control, and software quality engineering, which comprise product and process assurance. These · activities check that the standards, processes, and procedures are appropriate for the project; quality · attributes (e.g., reliability, maintainability, testability) are built into the software; and the project · correctly implements its standards, processes, and procedures. Software safety has grown in importance as more and more NASA systems have critical functions
and that specific safety analyses and tests are performed especially when there are specific software · safety issues and potential hazards. Software safety assures that requirements pertaining to · software’s control and monitoring of the safety of the system, personnel, environment, and any · safing of the system are identified and traced throughout the life cycle of the software. NASA-
Software Assurance Classification Assessment Process ... applies to use of new and existing (e.g., reuse, legacy, heritage) software products and components. The NASA Software Assurance Standard (hereinafter referred to as the "Standard") supports NPD
Assurance Plan for the acquirer. Appendix C provides a requirements compliance matrix for the ... Documents cited in this Standard are listed in this section. ... Reference documents listed in this section are for information only. ... IEEE Std. 1028- ... The references for the definitions in this Standard are NASA documents and consensus standards.

results.title: NASA-STD-8739.8B:2022 Software Assurance and Software Safety
results.description: NASA-STD-8739.8B:2022 · Current · Current · The latest, up-to-date edition. Add to Watchlist · Available format(s) Hardcopy , PDF · Language(s) English · Published date · 09-08-2022 · Publisher · National Aeronautics and Space Administration · Add to Watchlist · Free · Excluding Tax where applicable · Add to cart · The purpose of the Software Assurance and Software Safety Standard is to define the requirements to implement a systematic approach to software assurance, software safety, and Independent Verification and Validation (IV&V) for software created, acquired, provided, used, or maintained by or for NASA.

results.title: Nasa Technical Standard NASA-STD-8739.8A: Software Assurance and Software Safety Standard | PDF | Audit | Verification And Validation
results.description: NASA-STD-8739.8A - Free download as PDF File (.pdf), Text File (.txt) or read online for free. NASA - SOFTWARE ASSURANCE AND SOFTWARE SAFETY STANDARD Approved Date: 2020-06-10
results.content:
NASA-STD-8739.8A - Free download as PDF File (.pdf), Text File (.txt) or read online for free. NASA - SOFTWARE ASSURANCE AND SOFTWARE SAFETY STANDARD Approved Date: 2020-06-10
A 2020-06-10 The revised document addresses the following significant issues: combined the NASA Software Assurance Standard (NASA-STD-8739.8) with the NASA Software Safety Standard (NASA- STD-8719.13), reduction of requirements, bring into alignment with updates to NPR 7150.2, added a section on IV&V requirements to perform IV&V, and moved guidance text to an Electronic Handbook.
NPR SWE NPR 7150.2 Requirement Software Assurance and Software Safety Tasks 7150.2 # Section delegated to other parties or accomplished by 2. Maintain the requirement mapping matrix contract vehicles or Space Act Agreements. (matrices) for requirements in NASA-STD-8739.8.
Confirm that the identified safety-critical software project manager shall implement the safety- components and data have implemented the safety- critical software requirements contained in critical software assurance requirements listed in this NASA-STD-8739.8.
NPR SWE NPR 7150.2 Requirement Software Assurance and Software Safety Tasks 7150.2 # Section 3 Software Management Requirements 3.1 Software Life-Cycle Planning 3.1.2 033 The project manager shall assess options for 1. Confirm that the options for software acquisition software acquisition versus development. versus development have been evaluated. 2. Confirm the flow down of applicable software engineering, software assurance, and software safety requirements on all acquisition activities. (NPR 7150.2 and NASA-STD-8739.8).
